title: agrostis globosa
intro: Agrostis globosa, also known as Hair grass, is a type of perennial grass native to Australia and New Zealand. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Agrostis globosa is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, which can be used to treat a range of ailments, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
